Now, isn't it true that when you figured out the miscalculation caused by the fiat bug, you realized Alameda's overall NAV became positive? A. Yes. Q. So the overall NAV included all of Alameda's assets, no matter where they were held, right? A. Yes. Q. And in fact you felt relieved when you saw Alameda's NAV was positive after all of that, right? A. Yes. Q. Among other things, that meant that the fiat liability was secured by assets? A.
